description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a collared shirt layered under a pullover sweater, paired with fitted trousers and formal shoes. The figure has a clean, professional appearance, with neatly styled short hair and a symmetrical facial structure. The arms are relaxed and slightly bent at the elbows, with hands open and fingers extended naturally. The clothing fits closely to the body, suggesting a business-casual or office-appropriate style. The shoes are sleek and formal, complementing the overall polished look. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure stands upright in a neutral pose.
description: A male adult in business-casual attire with a sweater, collared shirt, trousers, and formal shoes, standing upright with a neat appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the collared shirt under a sweater, facial features, and both arms extended slightly outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the layered clothing, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, sweater, and trousers, with arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm position, and the fit of the clothing along the body.
attribute_clothing_type: collared shirt under a pullover sweater with fitted trousers and formal shoes
